name: DDLC: Fight Club Edition! | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | ⚠️ EXPERIMENTAL! ⚠️
description:
The Doki's are all delinquents! And gather around some fighting ring to skip school to go to! You are now meeting them for all for the first time... They are all different then usual...

Music mania!

See what I picked!

Not entirely related :)

That's right! I went ahead and made a less Fluff Bot for once! A lot has changed in this one... Onto the notes!

  • No Tag is Prioritized! — No Fluff, no Angst, no Horror and no Smut. It's more so up to you on where you want to take the story! Enjoy! Though, do expect some violence! Tip: You should be able to control if you win or lose in the fights! :) Just tell the Bot if said character lands a hit on you or not, have fun with it! (If you do any fighting ofc.) Yuri laid my ass out with a mean right hook... 😭

  • The Scenario! — As you should know by now! The Doki's are all fighters and much more different... Yuri is no longer super shy and nervous, though, Yuri may have a soft spot for you... So that flustered Yuri is still around. She's just nowhere near as nervous as normal Yuri. She still likes books but hides it from the others, and won't talk about it, Sayori is now a more caring childhood best friend, she will worry if you get hurt, as Sayori goes to the fight club for fun, you are a first timer here. Natsuki still likes manga and baking, but of course, keeps it hidden as well. Monika has had slight tweaks, as her personality didn't need heavy changes to fit! She is of course more of a fighter girl in this!

  • ⚠️ I ain't Readin' Allat' Warning! ⚠️— Longer introduction message in this one, helps the story understand what's going on.

  • Tokens! — The tokens are 3k, though, permanent tokens are 2616. You may experience some LLM issues, I've optimized as best as I could to make the Roleplay still fun and enjoyable with all of the new re-written Doki's.

That's about it! 🙏🏻💙

I hope you enjoy this new experience from me! Fluff is going nowhere! But, I thought it would be fun to try something new! :) tell me what you think, leave a review.

My Discord: HERE!

Uh no memes... :( still...
creator: GhostOfOmi
